ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "company_ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price during the trading session */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price during the trading session */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the trading session */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the trading session */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during the session */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price after corporate actions */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the prices are quoted */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market data */,
  "corporate_actions" TEXT /* Corporate actions that affect the stock price */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data entry related to the signal */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technical indicator used to generate the signal */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of trading signal (e.g., MACD, RSI, DMI) */,
  "signal_value" REAL /* Value of the trading signal */,
  "signal_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was generated */,
  "signal_source" TEXT /* Source of the signal (e.g., algorithm, manual input) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES technical_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator and its use in trading */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula or method used to calculate the indicator */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the calculation of the indicator */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example of how the indicator is used in trading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the portfolio belongs */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., stocks, bonds) */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested in the particular investment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the investment */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on Investment (ROI) of the investment */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the investment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading signal related to the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES trading_signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)
